offer: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, inaccurate cost allocation causes cash flow gaps. We aggregate utility bills instead of manual tracking and allocation of utility costs.
problem: Inaccurate cost allocation of utility bills across properties
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management
try_it: Let users try manual entry of utility bills and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminders for regular tasks
Enable CSV import for existing utility data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process to reduce steps
